title: HexShot
description: Magic and Guns and some small little things
body:
![Hexshot Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47da98d52e5c2198c480dd252559694de2a0b092.png)This Mod adds a revolver that can be powered by crafting with dark essence, also to make dark essence you need to make mold and with 4 mold you use a sculk catalyst you make a dark creature and then you kill it and get dark essence to make the dark revolver and some other small things I will hopefully be working on this mostly but yeah thats all. Enjoy!

Optional: [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
